steps.title: Connect
steps.description: Integrate YAPU into your existing systems via API, or use our standalone application. Setup takes days, not months.

steps.title: Collect
steps.description: Your field teams gather data with our mobile tools — even offline in rural areas. Climate risks, borrower profiles, impact indicators.

steps.title: Decide
steps.description: AI-powered scoring, automated reports, and real-time dashboards. Better decisions for your team, transparent impact for your investors.
